author.name: dietrich

content.text:
I wish Github comments were all embedded @hackmdio editors... or gists were collaborative editors... or something like that.

An in-Github collaborative editor that autosaved to the repo for things like meeting notes would remove a lot of daily overhead.
content.html:
I wish Github comments were all embedded @hackmdio editors... or gists were collaborative editors... or something like that.

An in-Github collaborative editor that autosaved to the repo for things like meeting notes would remove a lot of daily overhead.
